name: Apify
description: Extract data from any website with thousands of scrapers, crawlers, and automations on Apify Store ⚡
longDescription: Official Apify MCP server for web scraping and automation. Search for Actors in Apify Store, call Actors, retrieve run results, manage datasets and key-value stores, and search Apify documentation.
author: com.apify

apiKeyConfig.label: API Key / Bearer Token
apiKeyConfig.helperText: Apify API token for authentication with Apify platform services. For example 'Bearer <apify-api-token>'

examplePrompts: Search for web scraping Actors on Apify
Run the Web Scraper Actor on this URL
Get results from my last Actor run
Search Apify docs for proxy configuration
